rulings.Case Title: ALLA SNEPER AS TRUSTEE OF THE ALLA SNEPER 1993 VS. STEPHEN COOK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order Sealing Court Record
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT STEPHEN COOK's Motion For Order Sealing Court Record. Grant sealing, deny sanctions. = (501/REQ)

PLAINTIFFs RONALD ZOLEZZI and MARY ZOLEZZI's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE VS. FREDDIE FIELDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. JOSE A RAMOS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTs FREDDY GARCIA and MILTON GARCIA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RONNIE NEWT VS. LARRY VON MULLER
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT LARRY VON MULLER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege in good faith service of notice and to attach notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. CATALINA R. CARGADO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 10, 2012, line DEFENDANT CATALINA CARGADO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, five days to answer. Complaint sufficient re compliance with CC 2924. = (501/REQ)
